Gallery.title: Project Title
Gallery.feature1: ✔️ Invisible finish '–' Hidden teeth for a neat appearance
Gallery.feature2: ✔️ Smooth operation '–' Easy to open and close with a slider
Gallery.feature3: ✔️ Lightweight & durable – Suitable for delicate and lightweight fabrics
Gallery.feature4: ✔️ Fine teeth (2CC) – Ideal for precision stitching and a refined finish
Gallery.feature5: ✔️ Wide color range – Matches various fabrics and designs
Gallery.application: Perfect for dresses, skirts, blouses, gowns, cushions, and other fashion or home textile products where a concealed closure is preferred.

Services.name: Concealed Zipper Supply
Services.text: High-quality concealed zippers designed for smooth operation and a flawless invisible finish.

Services.name: Bulk Order Supply
Services.text: Efficient handling of large-volume orders with consistent quality and timely delivery.

Services.name: Ready Stock Availability
Services.text: Well-maintained inventory to ensure quick dispatch and uninterrupted supply.

Services.name: Color Matching
Services.text: Wide range of colors and sizes options as per garment needs.

Services.name: Fast & Reliable Delivery
Services.text: Strong logistics network ensuring quick and safe delivery across India.

Services.name: Quality Assurance
Services.text: Strict quality control to ensure durability, strength, and consistent performance.

Features.title: Smooth & Invisible Finish
Features.text: Our concealed zippers are designed to blend seamlessly into garments, giving a clean and premium look.

Features.title: Strong & Durable Quality
Features.text: Manufactured with high-quality materials to ensure long-lasting performance and reliability.

Features.title: Wide Range of Options
Features.text: Available in multiple sizes, colors, and styles to meet diverse garment requirements.

Features.title: Precision & Consistency
Features.text: Every zipper is crafted with precision to ensure consistent quality in every batch.
